ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., Logistic Regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm and its typical use cases */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the algorithm */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source from which the dataset was obtained */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last modified */,
  "size_in_mb" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "logreg_score" REAL /* Score achieved by the Logistic Regression algorithm */,
  "naiveBayes_score" REAL /* Score achieved by the Naive Bayes algorithm */,
  "binomial_score" REAL /* Score achieved by the Binomial model */,
  "ranger_score" REAL /* Score achieved by the Ranger algorithm */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision score */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall score */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the performance metric record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric record was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the performance metric record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the evaluation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the evaluation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the evaluation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_evaluations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the comparisons made in the report */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation file */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm associated with the documentation */,
  "documentation_file" TEXT /* File path of the documentation */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the documentation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the documentation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_documentation_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
